headline: Allegion US Unveils Latest Innovations with Schlage XE360, Zentra, Gatewise at Apartmentalize 2026
summary: Allegion US, a leading provider of security solutions, technology and services, will be showcasing new interoperable electronic access control solutions and integrations from Schlage, Zentra™ and Gatewise™ June 17–19 at NAA Apartmentalize (Booth #2307), an annual event that brings together multifamily housing professionals from around the world for three days of education, networking and learning about the latest industry trends and best practices.

headline: Allegion PLC (NYSE:ALLE) Offers a Balanced Blend of Dividend Growth and Financial Strength
summary: Allegion (ALLE) is a top dividend stock with a 1.69% yield, strong 9.79% annual growth, and a conservative payout ratio. It combines excellent profitability with solid financial health, making it a standout for income-focused investors seeking quality and stability.
